name: Golden Prism
searchText: darma-custom-657 golden prism creative rich svg prism particles geometric illustrated creative loader html-css customizable rich-batch-01 html css react singleelement cssonly customizable
previewHtml:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="200" width="200">
  <g style="order: -1;">
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100)"
      stroke-width="1"
      stroke="#d3a410"
      fill="none"
      points="70,70 148,50 130,130 50,150" id="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-bounce"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100)"
      stroke-width="1"
      stroke="#d3a410"
      fill="none"
      points="70,70 148,50 130,130 50,150" id="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-bounce2"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#414750"
      points="70,70 150,50 130,130 50,150"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="url(#darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente)"
      points="100,70 150,100 100,130 50,100"
    ></polygon>
    <defs>
      <linearGradient y2="100%" x2="10%" y1="0%" x1="0%" id="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente">
        <stop style="stop-color: #1e2026;stop-opacity:1" offset="20%"></stop>
        <stop style="stop-color:#414750;stop-opacity:1" offset="60%"></stop>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <polygon
      transform="translate(20, 31)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#b7870f"
      points="80,50 80,75 80,99 40,75"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="translate(20, 31)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="url(#darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente2)"
      points="40,-40 80,-40 80,99 40,75"
    ></polygon>
    <defs>
      <linearGradient y2="100%" x2="0%" y1="-17%" x1="10%" id="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente2">
        <stop style="stop-color: #d3a51000;stop-opacity:1" offset="20%"></stop>
        <stop
          style="stop-color:#d3a51054;stop-opacity:1"
          offset="100%" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-animatedStop"
        ></stop>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(180 100 100) translate(20, 20)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#d3a410"
      points="80,50 80,75 80,99 40,75"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(0 100 100) translate(60, 20)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="url(#darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente3)"
      points="40,-40 80,-40 80,85 40,110.2"
    ></polygon>
    <defs>
      <linearGradient y2="100%" x2="10%" y1="0%" x1="0%" id="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-gradiente3">
        <stop style="stop-color: #d3a51000;stop-opacity:1" offset="20%"></stop>
        <stop
          style="stop-color:#d3a51054;stop-opacity:1"
          offset="100%" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-animatedStop"
        ></stop>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100) translate(80, 95)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#ffe4a1"
      points="5,0 5,5 0,5 0,0" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-particles"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100) translate(80, 55)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#ccb069"
      points="6,0 6,6 0,6 0,0" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-particles"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="rotate(45 100 100) translate(70, 80)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#fff"
      points="2,0 2,2 0,2 0,0" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-657-particles"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#292d34"
      points="29.5,99.8 100,142 100,172 29.5,130"
    ></polygon>
    <polygon
      transform="translate(50, 92)"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke=""
      fill="#1f2127"
      points="50,50 120.5,8 120.5,35 50,80"
    ></polygon>
  </g>
</svg>
